creator: sec@42.org
text:
the netpbm tools lack manpages, although they refer to them.

Fix: 

change port to install manpages.
How-To-Repeat: 
ice:~>pkg_info -I netpbm\*
netpbm-10.26.45     A toolkit for conversion of images between different format

ice:~>pnmcat -\?
pnmcat: Use 'man pnmcat' for help.

ice:~>man pnmcat
No manual entry for pnmcat
